content: Backend: sid claim in JWT + session check + login sets active_session_id + /auth/logout
Backend: SELL chip requests + block instant CHIPS_TO_POINTS + type field on BUY
Backend: admin approve/deny handles SELL (debit chips + credit points on approval)
Backend: /admin/users aggregation — deposits, wins, losses per user
Frontend: api.js SESSION_REPLACED handling + AuthContext logout calls /auth/logout + Login.js message
Frontend: ChipsPage.js — sell via request flow, keep points→chips instant, type badges in history
Frontend: AdminChipRequests.js type column + type-aware dialogs; AdminUsers.js stats columns
Run testing agent (backend + frontend) and fix all reported issues
